name: Roasted Tomato and Mint Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons lime juice (from one Mexican lime)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a comal or black iron skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Cook the tomatoes on the heated comal until they are blackened all over.
3. Once warm, pulse the cooked tomatoes with garlic in a food processor until roughly chopped.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (cilantro, spearmint, lime zest, orange zest, and salt) to the cooled tomato mixture.
6. Mix thoroughly and let sit for at least 30 minutes before serving.
(Note: This salsa pairs well with dishes like wild Churro lamb, venison chops, grilled pork, grilled marlin, and tortilla chips.)
